product.name: AI Notecards
product.tagline: AI-powered flashcard generation with a creator marketplace
product.description: Paste notes or type a topic, AI generates study flashcards. Buy and sell decks on the marketplace. Bring your own AI model with BYOK.

features.name: Email/password auth
features.description: Signup starts 7-day trial. bcrypt hashing, JWT in httpOnly cookies (web) or Bearer token (iOS).

features.name: Sign in with Apple
features.description: Create-only flow (no account linking). HMAC-based nonce (no server storage). Apple provides name/email only on first auth — persisted to UserDefaults as backup.

features.name: 24h JWT with kill switch
features.description: Unified 24h JWT for web and iOS. token_revoked_at column invalidates all tokens on logout/deletion/compromise. No refresh tokens.

features.name: Soft-delete account
features.description: PII scrub (email, display_name, apple_user_id, source_text). Delist marketplace listings. Cancel pending payouts. Does NOT auto-cancel Apple subscription.

features.name: SIWA account linking
features.description: If SIWA email matches existing email+password account, require password confirmation to merge. Prevents hostile takeover.

features.name: Forgot-password flow
features.description: Transactional email with reset token. Deferred because SIWA is primary iOS auth and adds email service dependency.

features.name: Refresh tokens
features.description: 15-min access + 30-day refresh with family tracking. Eliminated in v1 — 24h JWT over HTTPS is sufficient for flashcard app risk profile.

features.name: Apple credential revocation handler
features.description: Handle Apple's revocation notification to force server-side logout. 24h JWT naturally expires in v1.

features.name: AI flashcard generation
features.description: Paste notes or type a topic. AI generates 8-25 cards (hard cap 30). System prompt optimized for study-quality Q&A pairs.

features.name: Auto-fallback between providers
features.description: If primary provider (Groq) fails, auto-fallback to secondary (Gemini). For BYOK, no fallback — user's key, user's problem.

features.name: Per-provider timeouts
features.description: Groq 30s, Gemini 45s, OpenRouter 80s. Server route timeout 90s. iOS client timeout 120s. Layered correctly.

features.name: Input length validation
features.description: Server-side: 30K chars for Free/Pro/Trial, 200K for BYOK Pro. Client-side character counter with limit display.

features.name: Source text truncation
features.description: Store only first 5000 chars of input in decks.source_text. Full 200K BYOK input not persisted.

features.name: Batch card inserts
features.description: Multi-row INSERT for generated cards instead of 30 sequential queries. ~400ms savings.

features.name: Deck CRUD
features.description: View deck list, deck detail with cards. Edit card front/back, add card, delete card, delete deck.

features.name: Deck origin tracking
features.description: Decks marked as 'generated' or 'purchased'. Purchased decks don't count toward deck limits.

features.name: Offline deck caching
features.description: SwiftData local DB for offline study mode. All v1 features require network.

features.name: Card flip study sessions
features.description: 3D card flip animation. Mark known/unknown. Progress indicator. Session summary with score and percentage.

features.name: Study score
features.description: Increments on session completion. Displayed on user profile and seller dashboard as reputation signal.

features.name: Haptic feedback
features.description: Light impact on card flip, success notification on session completion.

features.name: Spaced repetition
features.description: SM-2 algorithm for optimized review scheduling. Cards marked 'unknown' appear more frequently.

features.name: API key encryption and storage
features.description: AES-256-GCM with AAD bound to userId. Format: iv:authTag:ciphertext (no version prefix in v1). Stored in users.openrouter_api_key_encrypted.

features.name: Model selection
features.description: Hardcoded curated list of ~10 popular models (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Llama, etc.). User picks preferred_model stored in DB.

features.name: Lazy key validation
features.description: Key validated on first generation attempt, not upfront. Invalid key returns byok_key_invalid error directing to settings.

features.name: BYOK error mapping
features.description: OpenRouter errors mapped to user-facing messages: 401→invalid key, 402→no credits, 429→rate limited, 502→provider down.

features.name: Dynamic model list from OpenRouter
features.description: Fetch available models from OpenRouter API instead of hardcoded list. Enables new model discovery without app update.

features.name: Key versioning
features.description: Add v2: prefix to encryption format when ENCRYPTION_KEY is rotated. Values without prefix are v1.

features.name: Stripe subscriptions (web)
features.description: Pro $9/mo via Stripe Checkout. Cancellation at period end. Webhook-driven lifecycle management.

features.name: Apple IAP subscriptions (iOS)
features.description: Pro $9/mo and BYOK Pro $5/mo as auto-renewable subscriptions in same subscription group. StoreKit 2 with dual verifier (production + sandbox).

features.name: App Store Server Notifications V2
features.description: Handles SUBSCRIBED, DID_RENEW, EXPIRED, REFUND, REVOKE. Idempotency via processed_apple_notifications table. Cancels Stripe subscription when Apple subscription activates.

features.name: Subscription restore
features.description: AppStore.sync() for restoring purchases on new device. Transaction.currentEntitlements checked at launch.

features.name: Paywall triggers
features.description: Shown on: generation limit reached, marketplace listing attempt (Pro required), BYOK settings (BYOK Pro required), trial expiry.

features.name: Stripe Direct payments (discount)
features.description: Offer discounted subscriptions ($7.99 Pro, $3.99 BYOK) via Stripe Payment Links to bypass Apple's 30% cut. External payment link in iOS.

features.name: Grace period handling
features.description: Track DID_FAIL_TO_RENEW with grace period. Show banner. Keep access during billing retry window.

features.name: Browse and search listings
features.description: Cursor-based pagination. Full-text search via PostgreSQL tsvector. Filter by category (13 seeded). Sort by popular/newest/rating/price.

features.name: Purchase via Stripe (web)
features.description: Stripe Checkout with destination charges. 70/30 split (seller/platform). Idempotent fulfillment via ON CONFLICT.

features.name: Purchase via Apple IAP (iOS)
features.description: Consumable IAP (tier1-5, $1-$5). Price validation against listing. Self-purchase prevention. 14-day payout hold. UserDefaults crash recovery.

features.name: Create and manage listings
features.description: Pro/BYOK Pro can list generated decks. Min 10 cards, max 50 active listings, $1-$5 price, 13 categories, up to 5 tags.

features.name: Ratings
features.description: 1-5 stars, one per user per listing. Requires purchase + completed study session. Atomic SQL average calculation.

features.name: Content moderation
features.description: Flag listings (5 reasons). Admin queue with dismiss/uphold/suspend actions. Removed listings hidden from marketplace.

features.name: Seller dashboard
features.description: Earnings overview, listing stats, Stripe Connect onboarding via ASWebAuthenticationSession (iOS) or redirect (web).

features.name: 14-day seller payout hold
features.description: Payouts held for 14 days after purchase. Prevents refund fraud. Status tracked: pending→eligible→paid or refunded.

features.name: Automated payout cron
features.description: Daily cron to process eligible payouts via Stripe Connect transfers. v1 uses manual SQL trigger.

features.name: Automated content moderation
features.description: 3-layer pipeline: obscenity filter → decancer → OpenAI Moderation API. Auto-flag for review.

features.name: Rating revision
features.description: Allow users to update their rating after subsequent study sessions.

features.name: Cohort drops
features.description: Weekly/biweekly featured deck release events. Limited-time drops for scarcity-driven engagement.

features.name: Seller badges
features.description: New → Verified → Elite tiers based on sales volume, ratings, and account age.

features.name: Share decks via link
features.description: Free deck sharing outside marketplace as viral loop for user growth.

features.name: Profile editing
features.description: Display name, email (read-only). Preferred model for BYOK.

features.name: Subscription management
features.description: View current plan. Link to Apple subscription management or Stripe portal.

features.name: BYOK settings
features.description: API key entry/removal, masked key display, model picker with hardcoded list.

features.name: Password change
features.description: Allow email+password users to change their password.

features.name: Content flag queue
features.description: View all flags, resolve (dismiss/uphold/suspend). Web-only admin at /admin/flags.

features.name: iOS admin view
features.description: Native AdminFlagsView.swift. v1 uses web admin via Safari.

features.name: Multi-admin roles
features.description: Role-based access for multiple moderators.

features.name: Health check with version
features.description: GET /api/health returns DB status and minClientVersion for iOS force-update checks.

features.name: Structured error codes
features.description: Shared error code constants (server/src/constants/errors.js mirrored by iOS APIError enum). Prevents string-matching drift.

features.name: Per-route body parser limits
features.description: 500KB on /api/generate (BYOK), 100KB everywhere else. No global express.json().

features.name: Push notifications
features.description: Sale notifications for sellers, study reminders for buyers. APNs integration.

features.name: iOS widgets
features.description: Home screen widgets: study streak, due decks, marketplace alerts.

features.name: Email service
features.description: Transactional emails: trial reminders, payment failure dunning, email verification, password reset.

features.name: Android app
features.description: Kotlin/Jetpack Compose native app targeting same Express API.

features.name: Warm parchment palette
features.description: Background #FAF7F2, text #1A1614, accent green #1B6B5A, gold #C8A84E. System light/dark mode adaptation.

features.name: SF Symbols
features.description: Native iOS icons throughout. No web icon ports.

features.name: Liquid glass effects
features.description: iOS 26 design language. Deferred — not publicly available. Progressive enhancement when iOS 26 ships.

backend.payments_ios: Apple IAP (StoreKit 2) + App Store Server Notifications V2
